desc: [UPSTREAM] Track explicit T6040 ATC PHY + SN201202x HPM support; map per-bucket reg_offset only when upstream publishes it (never invent). Checked 2026-07-23: m1n1 atcphy-new-tunables is stale at 9657a52 (2025-01-16, 353 behind main) and has no T6040 data; current m1n1 and published Linux ATC branches also have no T6040 compatible/resource map. The captured right-port ADT contract is now exact: aapl,spmi hpm2 -> acio2 -> atc-phy2, with 44 PHY register entries and T6040-only USB2/CIO4 records. Ticket 063 proved DART+xHCI root hubs but no child. A safe implementation still needs SPMI controller, SN201202x role/orientation, named 44-bank PHY resources/bucket bases, connector graph, and reviewed ownership sequencing. No SPMI writes are authorized (done/2026-07-23-t6040-atcphy-upstream-checkpoint.md).
author: claude
